zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan de Beauffou於1171年出生在英國諾福爾可金也斯 琳時，她的父親Fulk Beauffou Lord of Thatcham28歲，母親Agatha de Beaufoe28歲。她與Thomas de Ingoldisthorpe I結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1243年5月7日之前在英國英格蘭諾福爾可卡素 利辛。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan de Beauffou was born in 1171, in King's Lynn, Norfolk, England, her father, Fulk Beauffou Lord of Thatcham, was 28 and her mother, Agatha de Beaufoe, was 28. She married Thomas de Ingoldisthorpe I. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died before 7 May 1243, in Castle Rising, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan de Beauffou est née en 1171, à King's Lynn, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Fulk Beauffou Lord of Thatcham, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Agatha de Beaufoe, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas de Ingoldisthorpe I. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée avant 7 mai 1243, à Castle Rising, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.lifeSummary: Joan de Beauffou(이)가 1171년 영국 노르폴크 킨그'스 린에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Fulk Beauffou Lord of Thatcham(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agatha de Beaufoe(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 Thomas de Ingoldisthorpe I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1243년 5월 7일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 카스틀 리징에서 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan de Beauffou родилась в 1171 г. в местности кинг'с линн, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Fulk Beauffou Lord of Thatcham было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Agatha de Beaufoe, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Ingoldisthorpe I. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла перед 7 май 1243 г. в местности кастл рисинг, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.
